creator: roam@ringlet.net
text:
On Thu, Sep 06, 2001 at 08:43:53AM +0200, Martti Kuparinen wrote:
> 
> >Number:         30366
> >Category:       ports
> >Synopsis:       stunnel checksum fix
> >Originator:     Martti Kuparinen
> >Release:        FreeBSD 4.4-RC i386
> 	
> >Description:
> 
> Fix the checksum.

In a separate message to -ports, you state that you have received
confirmation from the author that the distfile change was valid.
Still, do you have any idea what changed in the distfile?
(Not implying anything about this particular case, one still can
 imagine a situation where the author himself trojans his code ;)

G'luck,
Peter

-- 
If wishes were fishes, the antecedent of this conditional would be true.
